description: Candid photograph, not a designed graphic. It is a vertical (portrait) snapshot of a dark-colored pickup truck lying upside down (overturned, roof on the ground) in a grassy field at a roadside, with its undercarriage, wheels and tires facing up toward the sky. The grass is tall and green, the lighting is flat daylight. The image is low-resolution. There is no on-image text, no agency seal or logo, no headline, slogan, or graphic typography overlaid. The OCR text is coordinate noise; there is no designed text. The photo accompanies a tweet describing Dallas ICE officers rescuing a driver from a pickup that lost a tire, rolled over seven times, and landed upside down on April 26.
